tasks.title: Stop MCP job manager on Close and use cancellable context
evidence: internal/mcp/server.go NewServer starts the manager with context.Background(), so workers never stop with server shutdown.
internal/mcp/server.go Close only closes the store and does not cancel or wait for the manager goroutines.
plan: Store a cancellable context in the MCP Server and start the manager with it.
Update Close to cancel the context, wait for the manager, then close the store.
Add a test that Close stops the manager and does not leave work running.

tasks.title: Close HTTP response body on error to avoid leaks
evidence: internal/fetch/http_fetcher.go returns early on err != nil || resp == nil without closing resp.Body when resp is non-nil.
plan: When client.Do returns both err and resp, close resp.Body before retry/return.
Add a unit test using a custom RoundTripper that returns resp+err to assert body is closed.

tasks.title: Propagate rate limiter wait errors in HTTP fetcher
evidence: internal/fetch/http_fetcher.go ignores errors from req.Limiter.Wait(ctx, req.URL), so context cancellations do not short-circuit fetch.
plan: Check the error return from limiter.Wait and return immediately on cancellation/error.
Add a test that cancels context before Wait and asserts Fetch returns the context error.

tasks.title: Make exporter json output real JSON instead of JSONL
evidence: internal/exporter/exporter.go Export() returns string(raw) for both "json" and "jsonl", so "json" output is still JSONL.
plan: Convert JSONL to proper JSON: single object for scrape/research, array for crawl.
Keep jsonl output as-is while fixing json output only.
Add tests validating json output structure per job kind.

tasks.title: Increase exporter JSONL scan buffer for large lines
evidence: internal/exporter/exporter.go parseSingle/parseLines use bufio.Scanner without Buffer(), so JSON lines >64KB will fail.
plan: Set a larger scanner buffer (and max token size) for JSONL parsing.
Add a regression test with a JSON line larger than 64KB.

tasks.title: Stabilize exporter field ordering for markdown and CSV
evidence: internal/exporter/exporter.go iterates map fields with range in exportMarkdown and exportCSV, which produces nondeterministic ordering.
plan: Collect field keys, sort them, and use sorted order in markdown and CSV output.
Add tests that assert stable ordering of fields across runs.

tasks.title: Stream job results in CLI export/print to avoid large reads
evidence: internal/cli/cli.go runExport reads result files with os.ReadFile, loading entire results into memory.
internal/cli/cli.go printResults also uses os.ReadFile, which is costly for large result files.
plan: Introduce a streaming export path (e.g., io.Reader-based) in exporter.
Update runExport and printResults to stream results from disk.
Add tests covering large result files and streaming output.

tasks.title: Expose pipeline and incremental options in MCP tools
evidence: internal/mcp/server.go toolsList() schemas omit incremental and pipeline options for scrape/crawl/research.
internal/mcp/server.go handleToolCall creates jobs with pipeline.Options{} and incremental=false, ignoring pipeline/incremental inputs.
plan: Extend MCP input schemas to accept pipeline options and incremental flags.
Parse the new fields and pass them into CreateScrapeJob/CreateCrawlJob/CreateResearchJob.
Add tests covering MCP tool calls with pipeline and incremental options.

tasks.title: Return correct Content-Type for job results
evidence: internal/api/server.go handleJobResults uses http.ServeFile without setting Content-Type, so .jsonl results may be served as application/octet-stream.
plan: Set Content-Type based on result file extension (e.g., application/x-ndjson for .jsonl).
Add API tests asserting Content-Type for job results responses.

tasks.title: Handle non-OK job result responses in the web UI
evidence: web/src/App.tsx loadResults() calls fetch('/v1/jobs/.../results') and parses response text without checking response.ok, so 404/500 become misleading UI errors.
plan: Check response.ok before parsing and surface server error messages for non-2xx responses.
Introduce a minimal web test harness (e.g., Vitest + Testing Library) and add tests for error states.

tasks.title: Make web API base URL configurable
evidence: web/src/App.tsx calls API helpers with baseUrl: '' and uses fetch('/v1/jobs/...'), so the UI cannot target a non-root API host.
plan: Add VITE_API_BASE_URL (or similar) and wire API client + fetch calls to use it.
Document defaults in web/.env(.example) and add tests covering base URL usage.

tasks.title: Expand web auth inputs to cover cookies/query token options
evidence: web/src/App.tsx buildAuth() only passes basic and headers, while fetch.AuthOptions supports cookies and query tokens.
plan: Add UI fields for cookies and query params (and map to AuthOptions).
Update buildAuth to include the new fields and add UI tests for serialization.

tasks.title: Include install step in make ci
evidence: Makefile defines ci as generate format type-check lint build test, but the Makefile contract requires make ci to include install.
plan: Update the ci target to run install before other steps.
Ensure ci still runs generate/format/type-check/lint/build/test in the expected order.

tasks.title: Implement real dependency updates in make update
evidence: Makefile update target only echoes manual instructions instead of updating dependencies.
plan: Replace the echo with actual update commands for Go and pnpm deps.
Ensure lockfiles are updated and documented as part of make update.

tasks.title: Install CLI binary to ~/.local/bin in make build
evidence: Makefile build target only runs go build -o bin/spartan and does not install the binary to ~/.local/bin as required by the Makefile contract.
plan: Extend make build to copy/install the binary into ~/.local/bin (creating the dir if needed).
Keep existing bin/ output for local dev while ensuring the install step succeeds.

tasks.title: Expand make clean to remove lock files and log artifacts
evidence: Makefile clean only removes bin/.data and web dist/node_modules, but the Makefile contract calls for deleting lock files and logs as well.
plan: Add removal for lockfiles (e.g., pnpm-lock.yaml) and common log/artifact directories.
Document any destructive behavior in README or Makefile comments if needed.

tasks.title: Add missing file-level docstrings to code files
evidence: cmd/spartan/main.go starts directly with package main and has no file-level purpose comment.
internal/exporter/exporter.go and internal/fetch/http_fetcher.go have no top-of-file package purpose comments.
web/src/App.tsx and web/src/main.tsx have no file-level doc comments describing their role.
plan: Scan for code files lacking file-level docstrings (Go + TS/TSX) and add concise purpose comments.
Ensure any executable scripts have --help with examples (confirm or update as needed).
